name: input-search
title: BTInputSearch
description: Standalone search input field (does not wrap BTInput). Matches Figma node 750-2949 exactly: 12px×8px padding, 8px gap, radius-sm border, 12px/500/16px typography. Includes search icon (left), animated clear/cancel button (right, shown when focused + non-empty), error state (red border + red text), helper/validation text below, and optional validator function.
